description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring three large, plush back cushions and two seat cushions. The sofa is accessorized with five decorative throw pillows in various geometric and textured patterns, adding visual interest and comfort. The armrests are wide, straight, and boxy, with a subtle yellow accent trim running horizontally near the base, providing a contemporary touch. The back of the sofa is fully upholstered and plain, with the same yellow accent line continuing around the perimeter. The legs are short, block-style, and recessed, giving the sofa a grounded, stable appearance. The overall design is clean, minimalistic, and suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, light gray two-seater sofa with wide, boxy armrests, yellow accent trim, and five decorative throw pillows. The design is clean and minimalistic, with plush cushions and recessed block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large back cushions, two seat cushions, and five decorative throw pillows with geometric patterns.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wide, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, fully upholstered back with a continuous yellow accent trim and the tops of the back cushions visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two seat cushions, all uniform in size, with five varied decorative throw pillows placed symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, and boxy armrests at seat height, featuring a horizontal yellow accent trim near the base; no visible padding or decorative elements beyond the trim.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs recessed at the corners, likely made of wood or plastic, minimally visible and finished in black.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and segmented backrest formed by three large, loose cushions; no tufting or channeling, continuous in height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; no visible pattern or decorative stitching on the main upholstery, but throw pillows feature geometric and textured patterns.
